Description: A medium office building located in Guangzhou, China. The building footprint is approximately 37.4 m (east-west) by 31.2 m (north-south), rectangular, with the long axis rotated 15 degrees from north. Total gross floor area is about 3500.0 m^2 spread over 3 floor(s), giving roughly 1166.7 m^2 per floor. Floor-to-floor height is 3.6 m. The building is divided into 15 thermal zones in total (about 5 per floor). Typical space layout: per floor: 4 open-plan bays + core (restroom + IT + circulation). Window-to-wall ratio is approximately 30% on exterior walls, with windows distributed on all four facades. Model all zones with appropriate constructions, glazing, occupancy, lighting, equipment and HVAC (ideal loads) so the IDF runs in EnergyPlus without errors.
